sentences.arabic: شَجَرَةُ النَّخْلِ مِنْ أَهَمِّ الْأَشْجَارِ فِي الْعَالَمِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Palma datulja jedna je od najvažnijih stabala u arapskom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: The date palm is one of the most important trees in the Arab world.

sentences.arabic: يَأْكُلُ النَّاسُ ثِمَارَهَا وَهِيَ التَّمْرُ الَّذِي يُعَدُّ غِذَاءً مُقَوِّيًا.
sentences.translation: Ljudi jedu njene plodove — hurme, koje su vrlo hranjiva hrana.
sentences.translationEn: People eat its fruit — dates — which are a highly nutritious food.

sentences.arabic: تُصْنَعُ مِنْ أَوْرَاقِ النَّخْلِ السِّلَالُ وَالْقُبَعَاتُ وَأَدَوَاتٌ كَثِيرَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Od palminih listova prave se košare, šeširi i mnogi drugi predmeti.
sentences.translationEn: Palm leaves are used to make baskets, hats, and many other items.

sentences.arabic: يَرْمُزُ النَّخْلُ إِلَى الصَّبْرِ وَالْحَيَاةِ فِي الصَّحْرَاءِ الْقَاسِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Palma simbolizira strpljenje i život u surovoj pustinji.
sentences.translationEn: The palm tree symbolises patience and life in the harsh desert.
